user.title: Configure Lumagen Connection
user.description: Enter the IP address and port of your Lumagen's TCP-to-serial adapter.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Lumagen device. Please check your connection settings and ensure the device is powered on.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

abort.already_configured: This Lumagen device is already configured.

data_description.aspect_ratios: Select which aspect ratios appear in the Aspect Ratio menu. Unselected ratios will not be commandable.
